headline: Amid US-Iran War, Middle East Flight Cancellations Exceed 23,000 As Airline Losses Near $1 Billion
summary: U.S.-Iran war has caused 23,000 flight cancellations, costing almost $1 billion as Gulf carriers roll back operations.

raw.headline: Amid US-Iran War, Middle East Flight Cancellations Exceed 23,000 As Airline Losses Near $1 Billion
raw.summary: U.S.-Iran war has caused 23,000 flight cancellations, costing almost $1 billion as Gulf carriers roll back operations.

headline: TSA staff shortages lead to hourslong security lines for travelers at some airports
summary: Travelers are facing hourslong waits at some airport security lines amid TSA staffing shortages.

raw.headline: TSA staff shortages lead to hourslong security lines for travelers at some airports

headline: Delta Air Lines Leadership Reset Puts Fuel And Earnings Risks In Focus
summary: Delta Air Lines (NYSE:DAL) announced a major executive leadership overhaul, effective April 2026. Peter Carter is set to become President, Erik Snell will take on the role of Chief Financial Officer, and Dan Janki will move to Chief Operating Officer. The reshuffle includes several retirements and realignment of key roles across the senior leadership team. The changes come as the global airline sector faces heightened risk from soaring fuel costs and operational disruptions linked to...

headline: The Middle East War Is Crushing This Group of Stocks
summary: The war is a one-two punch for airlines, and their stocks are plummeting.
